- Description: Aora Module 2 v0.2 — SC-8 chocolate tasting exercise (terroir + concentration flights)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  Extended the Aora Supply Chain module per Gary's design: new SC-8 'Taste the place' chocolate tasting with two blind flights — Flight A terroir (same cacao concentration, different farms, serialized Agroverse QR codes as the blind-reveal mechanism, handing off into the QR-provenance finale, renumbered SC-9) and Flight B concentration ladder (same farm, 100/85/70/milk, absorbing SC-7's former workshop fallback). Child-simple tasting wheel, facilitation ordering, settings matrix + all three session templates updated, evidence section now captures tasting mats, new sourcing/customs open question for the China legs. PDFs regenerated and re-staged for Jerri. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/aora/pull/2
